PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Continued To Jun-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted there is no appearance; there are no courtesy copies, nor proposed order submitted to the court for review. The Petition for Spousal Property is Off Calendar.

****************

The courtesy copies and proposed order were dropped off at 10:47 a.m. on May 22, 2018. The Petition for Spousal Property will not go off calendar. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to June 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
